title: Blacklist
description: Per-cluster bad-node list. Read by preflight.run() at start (excludes from topology), respected by submit.run() shard partitioning. See README.supplements.md §S3.5 and skills/workflow/preflight.md §6.

node_id.description: Node identifier as used by the cluster scheduler (e.g. SLURM hostname).

severity.description: temporary = TTL-based, auto-expires; permanent = hardware fault, requires human removal.

evidence_ref.description: Path to the artifact (preflight log, FailureReport, dmesg snippet) that triggered this entry.

severity_count.description: Number of independent failures observed before promotion to blacklist.

expires_at.description: Required when severity=temporary; null for permanent.

last_rehab_check_at.description: Last time this node was re-tested (for rehab; see §S3.7 false-positive metric).
